sprint_brief.sprint_objective: Create a bounded implementation target for workflow visibility without writing code in the contract step.
sprint_scope: Define blocker and approval visibility requirements
sprint_brief.approval_check: Selected feature is approved_for_sprint; no additional approval is required for the normal contract draft.

sprint_contract.objective: Provide implementation_generator with a bounded contract for adding workflow visibility behavior.
sprint_contract.problem_statement: Humans and downstream agents need a clear view of workflow phase, completed agents, blockers, and next routing.
scope: Expose blockers and required human decisions

acceptance_criteria.description: Workflow status includes the current phase.
acceptance_criteria.verification_method: Inspect implementation output against sprint contract requirements.

dependency_restrictions: No new dependencies unless explicitly approved
security_or_privacy_constraints: Do not read or expose secrets
approval_gates: Escalate before changing permissions, secrets, deployment, CI/CD, or dependencies

repository_context: No source or test areas were present in the neutral example
validation_requirements: Implementation output must satisfy all required acceptance criteria

stop_conditions: Implementation would require code outside approved boundaries

handoff_notes_for_implementation_generat: Implement only the selected feature scope.
